text: Aaj phir saas ne sabke samne meri comparison nanad se ki aur kaha ki wo MNC mein hokar bhi ghar ka poora dhyan rakhti hai. Us argument ke baad se mere sir mein itna bhayanak dard hai jaise nasein phat jayengi aur aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai. Office ka kaam karna toh door, mujhse kitchen tak jane ki himmat nahi ho rahi, pura badan jaise pathar ho gaya hai.

Jab saas ne taana maara ki unki beti ne career aur parivaar dono bina 'nakhre' ke sambhale aur main thak jati hoon, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan shuru ho gayi. Kal raat se kuch bhi hazam nahi ho raha aur seene mein aisi bhari-pan hai jaise koi aag lagi ho. Is joint family ke kalesh mein meri tabiyat itni gir gayi hai ki haath-pair bilkul thande pad gaye hain.

Har waqt saas ka domination aur unki beti se comparison sunte-sunte mera gala ghutne lagta hai aur seene mein ajeeb si chubhan hoti hai. Aaj phir wahi behes hui aur tabse meri saans phool rahi hai, lagta hai jaise dil par kisi ne bhari pathar rakh diya ho. Itni kamzori aa gayi hai ki laptop par ungliyan chalte waqt bhi kaanp rahi hain.

Privacy toh zero hai is ghar mein, upar se saas ne aaj phir meri suppressed ambition par chot ki aur nanad ki tareefo ke pull baandh diye. Us argument ke baad se meri pith aur kandhon mein aisi jakdan ho rahi hai ki main seedhi khadi bhi nahi ho pa rahi hoon. Pura sharir jaise toot raha hai aur ajeeb si bechaini ho rahi hai jisse neend hi nahi aa rahi.

Jab bhi saas meri 'career' ko lekar izzat ka waasta deti hain aur apni beti ki tareef karti hain, mere kaano mein seetiyaan bajne lagti hain aur sir chakkar khane lagta hai. Aaj subah se itni thakan hai ki lagta hai bukhar chadh jayega aur pura badan dukh raha hai. Mujhse ab ye ghar aur MNC ka dual burden bardaasht nahi ho raha, sharir jawab de raha hai.
